docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-15-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-03-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PARTIES SETTLED. IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 6/3/02, THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BURKE, REUBEN IND. & DBA BURKE'S TILE NON-APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAILING TO BURKE REUBEN (IND DBA BURKES TILES) RETURNED SIGNED.
